name: Heroes of Hellas 3: Athens
short_description: Rebuild Athens from the ashes of its destruction and secure the help of the Heroes of Olympus as you battle an evil god!
detailed_description:
New farm frenzy is ready to amuse you!


About the Game

Rebuild Athens from the ashes of its destruction and secure the help of the Heroes of Olympus as you battle an evil god! Through addictive match three-gameplay and compelling city building interludes, you will gather gold, meet the needs of a ravaged population, and search for legendary lockets that will allow you to summon the gods and appeal to them for help. Two years in the making, Heroes of Hellas 3 is both a spectacular epic and a highly accessible casual game. Are you ready to meet the gods?

supported_languages:
English*, French, Italian, German, Spanish - Spain, Dutch, Russian, Polish
*languages with full audio support
